requiredSupervisor.role: Blocks publication unless the article matches the WordPrais mayai-like structure, useful depth, SEO/GEO/neuro-search coverage, media policy, and duplicate policy.

subagentSystem.rule: No subordinate agent may mark its stage passed by assertion only; every pass must be backed by measurable artifact checks.

subagents.responsibility: Keeps the selected Wordstat phrase pending until verified publication; blocks already processed or duplicate phrases.
Checks title, slug, meta, primary keyword and content-index collisions before publish.
Blocks reused canonical topic keys, exact keyword reuse, and title/slug drift away from the selected Wordstat phrase.
Checks mayai-like useful guide structure: direct answer, table of contents, dense practical blocks, comparison table, FAQ/details, next steps, and no thin filler sections.
Validates post-body HTML: no H1 in body, unique H2/H3, valid image src/alt, JSON-LD, accessible tables, internal links, and no duplicated paragraphs.
Validates SEO title length, meta description length, featured cover, in-article banner, alt text, captions, and permanent WordPress/CDN media URLs.
Ensures useful article depth, search intent fit, keyword coverage, internal links, headings and practical sections.
Ensures direct answers, FAQ/details, quotable blocks, comparison tables, schema-ready structure and AI-search clarity.
Removes AI-slop, empty formalism, template triplets, vague claims and unnatural Russian phrasing.
Requires Make blueprint based photorealistic 16:9 cover and 21:9 banner with identity_lock, uploaded to WordPress.
Publishes only after QA and media gates pass; never uses draft/empty/placeholder publication as success.
Requires postId, public URL, HTTP 2xx, non-404 body, meaningful article content and visible media.
Writes actionRequired artifacts and sends Telegram notification when an external blocker remains.

hardGates.coverRequired: 16:9 WordPress media id and permanent URL
